(IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic)" as ApplyMinimization state "Reject/Reduce over-request
and show warning" as RejectOrReduce state "Record privacy decision
(IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController)" as RecordDecision [IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic] --> ReceiveRequest ReceiveRequest --> Validate Validate --> ApplyMinimization: valid Validate --> RejectOrReduce: invalid/excessive ApplyMinimization --> RecordDecision RejectOrReduce --> RecordDecision RecordDecision --> [IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker]
repo_description: The QuantumZero repository hosts the project’s public-facing static website, delivered through Static Pages. This site provides high-level information about the platform, including architectural overv

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为工业IoT场景设计一个属性最小化的活动流程图。核心场景是：移动端请求设备属性，PLC逻辑层需要先验证，再决定是放行还是削减请求。
明白了，所以起点是移动端发起请求，先进入"Receive requested attributes"状态。验证之后分两条支路：合法请求走最小化策略，非法或过度的请求走拒绝/削减分支。最后都要记录决策，对吗？
对，而且最小化策略和决策记录要标注清楚执行主体——ApplyMinimization由IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic处理，RecordDecision由IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController处理，这样责任边界清晰。
好的，我已经把五个状态节点画好了：ReceiveRequest、Validate、ApplyMinimization、RejectOrReduce、RecordDecision。主流程是ReceiveRequest→Validate→ApplyMinimization→RecordDecision，异常分支Validate→RejectOrReduce→RecordDecision。
还需要明确数据流向的终点。决策记录完成后，应该发送到MQTT Broker进行消息广播，这是整个工业控制系统的标准出口。
确认一下：起点是[IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic]，终点是[IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker]，中间五个状态节点，两条分支汇合到RecordDecision后再统一输出到Broker。
RejectOrReduce那个状态，描述要强调"over-request"和警告提示，让运维人员一眼看出这是安全拦截点。ApplyMinimization的标注里保留PLC_Logic的括号说明。

已调整：RejectOrReduce显示为"Reject/Reduce over-request and show warning"，ApplyMinimization标注了(IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic)，RecordDecision标注了(IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController)。整个流程从PLC逻辑层接收请求，到MQTT Broker输出，完整闭环。
